caption:
You didn't ignore them. You were on a job.

Hands full, phone in the van — it rings out. To the customer it doesn't matter why; a ring-out is a ring-out, so they ring the next trade. That's ~£24k a year for the average UK trade.

Something should answer while you can't. Free missed-call audit in bio. 👇

#plumber #electrician #tradeslife #ukandireland #missedcalls
